_comment: Positive fixture for PRD-105-R6, R7, R8 — the corporate-marketing composite from v0.1 draft §6.5 / §8.4. Plus level, single locale view (en-US root); per-locale roots are emitted under /es-ES, /de-DE, /ja-JP per the locales config. This fixture lists the en-US root only; PRD-104 owns the i18n file-set extension.
_search_note: The producer fulfills `search_url_template: "/act/search?q={query}"` by hosting a precomputed search index JSON at /act/search-index.json with a client-side wrapper that substitutes the query at consumer request time. If client-side substitution is not available, the producer MUST omit `search_url_template` from the manifest per PRD-107-R10.
